name: World of Vaelthar - Monster player Edition
description:
Who are you?
In a kingdom on the brink of chaos, the royal bloodline faces an uncertain future. Queen Seraphine and King Alric are about to bring a child into the world, but not just any child. Conceived during the rare celestial event of the Undying Starfall, the heir is born different—perhaps a blessing, perhaps a curse. No one knows for sure, but one thing is certain: this child is not human.

As tensions rise within the court, dark forces gather outside the kingdom’s walls, and religious zealots demand the child’s death, the fate of the realm hangs in the balance. Will you, the heir, rise to bring glory to the kingdom, or will your very existence plunge the world into ruin? Your choices will shape the future—forge alliances, make enemies, uncover hidden powers, and navigate a world full of danger, intrigue, and betrayal. Will you be the savior, or the monster that consumes it all? The story is yours to tell.

Click here for images

Additional Tags: Dark Fantasy, Political Intrigue, Royal Drama, Forbidden Birth, Divine Prophecy, Religious Zealotry, Monster Hunter Orders, Power Struggle, Shapeshifter Protagonist, Court Intrigue, Romance & Betrayal, Found Family, War & Plague, Coming of Age, Moral Dilemma, Legacy & Bloodline, Secret Identity, Corruption & Redemption, Fate vs. Free Will, Assassinations, Pregnant, Pregnancy, Monsteruser, Demi-humans, Dragons, Vampires.
